pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11 language rules, failing to utilize or enforce Java 17 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 17-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may not support Java 17 bytecode generation or annotation processing correctly, leading to compilation errors or runtime failures.
